data.acceptance: 1) Add a Light Theme toggle control in the Terminal header and in the History Terminal header. 2) Add a Light Theme setting in Settings that maps to the same underlying preference. 3) Toggling light theme updates the active terminal UI immediately; toggling in either header or settings updates the other control consistently. 4) Save the theme preference to the server-side settings store and load it on app/session start so the theme is restored for both terminals. 5) New or changed preference must survive app restart/new session with the selected mode applied before user interaction. 6) Validate by using chrome-devtools and/or playwright MCP: switch light theme from header/settings, navigate between both terminals, reload/new session, and confirm persisted theme state is preserved.
